column1: # Parity matrix: each row is one model benched on BOTH engines (skip a side by
# sampling_flags is MANDATORY (no '-' sentinel, unlike draft_gguf/system/
# spec_flags): it must mirror the model's docs/parameters.md profile (and its
# Modelfile PARAMETER block) in full, because GGUF sampling metadata silently
# overrides llama-server defaults for any flag not given (see the eval log).
# ctx and system apply to the llamacpp engine only; the Ollama side inherits
# both from the Modelfile (num_ctx, SYSTEM). GGUF paths are the same pinned
